name: Brownies--Tnt
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup egg beaters® 99% egg substitute (or 3 whole eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream half of the butter with sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg beaters or beaten eggs, then vanilla. Mix well.
3. Melt remaining butter with chocolate; allow to cool slightly.
4. Beat cooled mixture into the batter from step 2. Fold in flour, salt, and chopped nuts.
5. Pour mixture into a greased and floured 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
6. Bake in a preheated moderate oven (350°F) for about 35 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely before cutting into small squares.
Note: The original recipe called for 3 eggs, but the egg substitute yields similar results. Baking time is approximately 35 minutes at 350°F.
